title: rubus peracutidens
intro: Rubus peracutidens, also known as the prickly raspberry or cut-leaved raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of anthocyanins and phenolic acids, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus peracutidens include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health, while also exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Rubus peracutidens can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
